title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
